name: Pasta Aglio e Olio
steps: Cook pasta. Gently fry garlic and chili in olive oil. Mix together.

name: Chicken Soup
steps: Simmer chicken and vegetables until tender. Season and serve.

name: Greek Salad
steps: Chop ingredients and mix with olive oil and oregano.

name: Pancakes
steps: Mix batter, cook in pan, serve warm.

name: Fried Rice
steps: Stir-fry vegetables, add rice and egg, season with soy sauce.

name: Omelette
steps: Beat eggs, cook in pan, add cheese, fold and serve.
